svg.title: The agent didn't lie, it just didn't know — post banner
svg.desc: Blog post banner showing a golfer on a tee looking at his phone in frustration, water hazard running the full right side, scrub dividing two fairways, bunkers on the left fairway edge, golf flag in the distance

bx:file.path: The agent didn't lie, it just didn't know — post banner.svg
